---
title: "plot genotype data for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameters for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# parameters for plotting
dataset_name <- "constant_env_low_psi"
date <- "4_2"

# set these once for your machine / project
analysis_root <- "../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/1_26_constant_env"
base_plot_folder     <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/plots", date)
r_data_folder    <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure", "r_data", dataset_name)

library(MetBrewer)

if (!dir.exists(base_plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(base_plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

met_brewer_pallete <- "Austria"  # color pattern for lines
```

# load genotype data
```{r}
geno_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "genotype.rds"))
pheno_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "phenotype.rds"))
# fitness_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "fitness_norm.rds"))
# copied_val_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "copied_val.rds"))
# pheno_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "phenotype.rds"))
```

```{r}
# geno_df <- genotype_df
unique(geno_df[geno_df$reg == "fit", ]$psi)
```

```{r}
norm_const <- 0.0087186

num_cols <- suppressWarnings(!is.na(as.numeric(colnames(fitness_df))))

for (j in which(num_cols)) {
  fitness_df[[j]] <- fitness_df[[j]] / norm_const
}

```

# parameter space for data
```{r}
psi_val <- c(0.46)
single_psi <- 0.2
for (gen in list(c(9950, 9999))) {
  for (n in c(5)){
    for (shift_size in c("no_sz")){
      for (reg in c("fit")){
        for (type in c("genotype")){
          cat("Plotting:", type, " generation:", gen, " n:", n, " shift_size:", shift_size, " reg:", reg, "\n")
     
          breaks_vec <- seq(-40.5, 40.5, by = 0.5)  
          if (type == "genotype"){
            df_to_use <- geno_df
          } else if (type == "phenotype"){
            df_to_use <- pheno_df
          } else if (type == "copied_val"){
            df_to_use <- copied_val_df
          }

          if (length(gen) > 1 ){
            gen_title <- paste0(gen[1], "-", gen[2])
          }else{
            gen_title <- gen
          }

          if(gen_title >= 10000){
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", shift_size)
          }else{
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", 0)
          }

          if (is.integer(shift_size)){
            filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.1, shift_size=shift_size)
            filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2, shift_size=shift_size)
            filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.3, shift_size=shift_size)
            filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8, shift_size=shift_size)

            filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi, shift_size=shift_size)
          }else{
            filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.1)
            filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.2)
            filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.3)
            filt_D <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.8)

            filt_single <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=single_psi)
          }

        
          fils <- list(filt_single)
          if (length(fils) == 1){
            plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0(type, "_", gen_title, "_", single_psi))
          }else{
            plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0(type, "_", gen_title))
          }

          dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
          pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0(reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, ".pdf")), width=11.5, height=8)
          
          par(cex.axis = 2.0, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))
          # cols <- hcl.colors(4, hcl_color_palette)
          cols <- met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete")
          # cols <- c(cols[1], cols[2], cols[3])
          plot_hist_lines_multi(
            df = df_to_use,
            # filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
            filters = fils,
            generation = gen,
            breaks = breaks_vec,
            labels = list(title = title,
                          x = ifelse(type == "genotype", "Genotype value", "Phenotype value"),
                          y = "Proportion"),
            show_rep = TRUE,
            ymax = if (type == "phenotype") 0.15 else 0.05,
            cols = cols,
            lwd = 5
          )
          leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(lapply(fils, function(f) f$psi), function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
                
          legend("topright", bty = "n",
                  legend = leg_expr,
                col = cols, lwd = 2, cex=2.2)
          dev.off()
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
plot_hist_row_by_row <- function(df, filters, generation, breaks, labels, show_rep = FALSE, ymax = NULL, cols = NULL, lwd = 2) {
  # Filter the data frame based on the provided filters
  for (filt in filters) {
    for (key in names(filt)) {
      df <- df[df[[key]] == filt[[key]], ]
    }
  }

  # Get unique reps if show_rep is TRUE
  reps <- if (show_rep) unique(df$rep) else NA

  # Set up the plot area
  plot(NA, NA, xlim = range(breaks), ylim = c(0, ymax), xlab = labels$x, ylab = labels$y, main = labels$title)

  # Loop through each row and plot the histogram
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    row <- df[i, ]
    value_cols <- grep("^[0-9]+$", names(row), value = TRUE)
    values <- as.numeric(unlist(row[, value_cols], use.names = FALSE))

    hist(values, breaks = breaks, add = TRUE, col = cols[i %% length(cols) + 1], border = NA)
  }
}
```

```{r}
shift_size <- "no_sz"

for (gen in list(c(9950, 9999))) {
  for (reg in c("ext")) {

    cat("Plotting variance decomposition:", "generation:", paste(gen, collapse = "-"),
        "reg:", reg, "psi = 0.9\n")

    if (length(gen) > 1) {
      gen_title <- paste0(gen[1], "-", gen[2])
    } else {
      gen_title <- gen
    }

    title <- paste0("phenotype_var_decomp_", gen_title, "/", reg, "_", shift_size, "_psi0.9")

    n_vals <- c(2, 5, 8, 20, 50)

    within_vals  <- numeric(length(n_vals))
    between_vals <- numeric(length(n_vals))
    total_vals   <- numeric(length(n_vals))

    for (i in seq_along(n_vals)) {
      n_i <- n_vals[i]

      filt <- list(reg = reg, n = n_i, psi = 0.9)

      vd <- .var_decomp_for_filter(
        df = pheno_df,
        filter = filt,
        generation = gen
      )

      within_vals[i]  <- vd$mean_within
      between_vals[i] <- vd$mean_between
      total_vals[i]   <- vd$mean_total
    }

    out_dir <- file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("/phenotype_var_decomp_", gen_title))
    if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) {
      dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }

    pdf(file.path(out_dir, paste0(reg, "_", shift_size, "_psi0.9.pdf")),
        width = 11.5, height = 8)

    par(cex.axis = 2.0, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0,
        mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))

    ylim <- range(c(within_vals, between_vals), na.rm = TRUE)
    ylim[1] <- min(0, ylim[1])

    plot(n_vals, within_vals,
         type = "o",
         lwd = 5,
         pch = 16,
         cex = 1.8,
         xlab = "Group size (n)",
         ylab = "Variance component",
         main = title,
         ylim = c(0, 600),
         lty = 1)

    lines(n_vals, between_vals,
          type = "o",
          lwd = 5,
          pch = 16,
          cex = 1.8,
          lty = 2)

    legend("topleft", bty = "n",
           legend = c("Within-mode variance", "Between-mode variance"),
           lty = c(1, 2),
           lwd = 5, pch = 16, cex = 2.0)

    dev.off()
  }
}
```


## plot multi generation 
```{r}
for (gen in c(9999, 10000)){
  for (n in c(2,8,20,50)){
    for (shift_size in c(40, 20, 60, 120)){
      for (reg in c("fit", "ext", "ave")){
          type <- "fitness"
          cat("Plotting:", type, " generation:", gen, " n:", n, " shift_size:", shift_size, " reg:", reg, "\n")
          
          breaks_vec <- seq(0.6, 1.1, by = 0.01)  

          if(gen >= 10000){
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", shift_size)
          }else{
            title <- paste0(type, "_", gen, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, "opt = ", 0)
          }

          filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0, shift_size=shift_size)
          filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5, shift_size=shift_size)
          filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.9, shift_size=shift_size)

          # filt_A <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0)
          # filt_B <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.5)
          # filt_C <- list(reg=reg, n=n, psi=0.9)

          png(file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("/", type, "_", gen, "/", reg, "_", shift_size,"_", n, ".png")), width=2200, height=1500, res=150)
          if (!dir.exists(file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("/", type, "_", gen)))) {
            dir.create(file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("/", type, "_", gen)), recursive = TRUE)
          }
          par(cex.axis = 1.6, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(4.5, 6, 3, 1) + 0.1)
          fils <- list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C)
          cols <- hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)
          # cols <- c(cols[1], cols[3])
          plot_hist_lines_multi(
            df = fitness_df,
            # filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
            filters = fils,
            generation = gen,
            breaks = breaks_vec,
            labels = list(title = title,
                          x = ifelse(type == "genotype", "Genotype value", "Phenotype value"),
                          y = "Proportion"),
            show_rep = FALSE,
            ymax = 0.5,
            cols = cols
          )

          leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(lapply(fils, function(f) f$psi), function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
                
          legend("topright", bty = "n",
                  legend = leg_expr,
                col = cols, lwd = 2, cex=2.2)
          dev.off()
        
      }
    }
  }
}
```


```{r}
df_to_use<- geno_df
for (group_size in unique(df_to_use$n)){
  for (psi_plot in unique(df_to_use$psi)){
    cat("Plotting distribution for group size:", group_size, " and psi:", psi_plot, "\n")
    # group_size <- 5
    # psi_plot <- 0.2
    data_to_plot <- df_to_use[df_to_use$reg == "fit" & df_to_use$n == group_size & df_to_use$psi == psi_plot & df_to_use$generation <= 9999, ]

    .value_cols_int <- function(df) grep("^[0-9]+$", names(df), value = TRUE)
    vcols <- .value_cols_int(data_to_plot)

    vals <- as.numeric(unlist(data_to_plot[, vcols], use.names = FALSE))

    num_row <- nrow(data_to_plot)
    pdf(file.path(base_plot_folder, paste0("geno_dist_agg/fit_",group_size,"_", psi_plot,".pdf")), width=11.5, height=8)
    hist(vals, breaks = seq(-60.5, 60.5, by = 1), main = paste0("Genotype distribution for fit, n=", group_size, ", psi=", psi_plot, " with ", num_row, " generations"), xlab = "Genotype value", ylab = "Frequency")
    dev.off()
  }
}
```

## pdf of the heatmaps 
```{r}

# ----------------- user-editable settings -----------------
ns    <- c(2, 8, 20, 50)
psis  <- c(0, 0.5, 0.9)
regs  <- c("ave", "fit", "ext")
types <- c("genotype", "phenotype")
szs   <- c(20, 40, 60)

xcol <- "generation"          # change to "tick" if needed
gap_col <- "fluctuate_gap"    # column name in your dfs

# If phenotype is NOT wide numeric columns, set this to its value column name, e.g. "z"
# If phenotype IS wide numeric columns too, leave NULL.
pheno_value_col <- NULL

plot_folder <- paste0(base_plot_folder, "heatmap_pdf/")
if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
# ============================ main PDF loop ================================
for (shift_size in szs) {

  pdf_file <- file.path(
    plot_folder,
    paste0("heatmap_grid_gap_", gap, "_sz_", shift_size, ".pdf")
  )

  pdf(pdf_file, width = 18, height = 10, onefile = TRUE)

  # breaks fixed within this shift_size
  breaks_vec <- seq(-1 * as.integer(shift_size) - 10, as.integer(shift_size) + 10, by = 1)

  for (type in types) {
    if (type == "genotype") df_to_use <- geno_df
    else if (type == "phenotype") df_to_use <- pheno_df
    else if (type == "fitness") df_to_use <- fitness_df

    # decide how to read values for this type
    mode <- if (!is.null(pheno_value_col)) "long_col" else "wide_numeric"
    vcol <- if (mode == "long_col") pheno_value_col else NULL

    for (reg in regs) {

      # ---- 1) build ALL heatmats for this page, and compute shared zlim ----
      hm_list <- vector("list", length(psis) * length(ns))
      names(hm_list) <- paste(rep(psis, each = length(ns)), rep(ns, times = length(psis)), sep = "_")

      max_vals <- c()
      idx <- 1
      for (p in psis) {
        for (n in ns) {
          filt <- list(
            reg = reg,
            psi = p,
            n = n,
            shift_size = shift_size
          )
          # include gap filter only if column exists
          if (gap_col %in% names(df_to_use)) filt[[gap_col]] <- gap

          hm <- .build_heatmat(
            df = df_to_use,
            filter = filt,
            xcol = xcol,
            breaks_vec = breaks_vec,
            mode = mode,
            value_col = vcol,
            z = "prop"
          )

          hm_list[[idx]] <- hm
          if (!is.null(hm)) max_vals <- c(max_vals, max(hm$mat, na.rm = TRUE))
          idx <- idx + 1
        }
      }

      zlim_page <- c(0, max(max_vals, na.rm = TRUE))
      if (!is.finite(zlim_page[2]) || zlim_page[2] <= 0) zlim_page <- c(0, 1e-6)

      # ---- 2) layout: 3 rows × (4 panels + 1 colorbar) ----
      lay <- matrix(1:12, nrow = 3, ncol = 4, byrow = TRUE)
      lay <- cbind(lay, 13)
      layout(lay, widths = c(rep(1, 4), 0.40))


      # page title space
      par(oma = c(0.5, 0.5, 2.0, 0.5))

      # panel styling (you can control par() outside normally, but for PDF pages this is convenient)
      par(
        mar = c(2.8, 3.0, 2.0, 0.5),
        mgp = c(1.8, 0.6, 0),
        cex.axis = 0.9,
        cex.lab  = 1.0,
        cex.main = 0.95
      )

      # ---- 3) draw panels row-major: psi rows, n columns ----
      idx <- 1
      for (p in psis) {
        for (n in ns) {
          hm <- hm_list[[idx]]

          panel_title <- paste0("n=", n, ", psi=", p)
          xlab <- if (p == psis[length(psis)]) "Generation" else ""
          ylab <- if (n == ns[1]) {
            if (type == "genotype") "Genotype" else "Phenotype"
          } else ""

          .plot_heat_panel(
            hm = hm,
            zlim = zlim_page,
            col = hcl.colors(100, hcl_color_palette),
            main = panel_title,
            xlab = xlab,
            ylab = ylab,
            axes = TRUE,
            box = TRUE
          )

          idx <- idx + 1
        }
      }

      # ---- 4) shared colorbar cell ----
      par(mar = c(2.8, 0.3, 2.0, 3.5), mgp = c(1.8, 0.6, 0))
      .draw_colorbar_panel(zlim_page, col = hcl.colors(100, hcl_color_palette), label = "Proportion")

      # ---- 5) page title ----
      mtext(
        paste0(
          "shift_size=", shift_size, ", gap=", gap,
          " | ", .reg_label(reg), " | ", type
        ),
        side = 3, outer = TRUE, line = 0.2, cex = 1.2
      )
    }
  }

  dev.off()
  cat("Wrote:", pdf_file, "\n")
}

```
